$meta.label: Acuity (One45 modern)
$meta.source: symfony/tailwind_acuity_theme.js (== web/vendor/webeval_ss/acuity_branding.css --ds-*; == _colors.scss $acuity-* 49 of them; == tailwind_final.css subset). Four hand-synced copies, no single source — see reconciliation map.
$meta.note: This is the full DOCUMENTED token set. The tool renders a curated --ds-* subset of it (src/styles/tokens.css). The set covers colour / type / spacing / weight; it defines NO radius or shadow token.

formControls.$meta: [R] from the live DS gallery /test/designSystem (2026-06-22), getComputedStyle on .ds-form-input / .ds-form-select / ds-btn. These are RENDERED reality, not theme-file tokens (the DS form CSS is not in tailwind_acuity_theme.js). The tool renders these in src/styles/tokens.css.

focusRing.note: DS input ring is :focus-visible-gated (keyboard); the tool uses acuity-blue for a visible branded AA ring

shellSearch.$meta: [R] top-bar Find-a-person field — note the purple

navigation.$meta: [R] from the live DS gallery /test/designSystem (2026-06-22), getComputedStyle on Tabs/Link, cross-checked to tailwind_acuity_theme.js. INVENTORY GAP: the Acuity DS package ships NO Breadcrumb component (zero usages recovered from the React islands) — it is filled by the bridge for acuity. NO Pagination is enshrined (neither DS defines one). The tool renders these in src/styles/tokens.css.

tabs.note: active underline is acuity-green 2px (3.06:1 UI), NOT acuity-blue; nested tabs are a boxed variant (#949494 1px + white bg). Visual model differs from legacy's Bootstrap box tabs — rendered per-system, not token-swapped.

link.note: Acuity Link API is text + type(default|inline) + href/target; iconName=linkNewTab pairs with target=_blank

feedback.$meta: [R] from the live DS gallery /test/designSystem (2026-06-22, getComputedStyle on the headlessui Modal/Dialog) + API [D] from the islands. The Feedback & status slice enshrines Modal first. Of the requested set the acuity package imports only Alert/Modal/Badge/ProgressBar/Spinner — and only Alert+Modal are used in PRODUCTION islands (Badge/ProgressBar/Spinner appear on the demo page only). Toast/tooltip/popover/tag/empty-state are NOT in the package (zero usages). The tool renders Modal in src/styles/tokens.css.

modal.header: none (headerless — title on the white panel)
modal.note: headlessui Dialog; ONE canonical API absorbs this AND the legacy Bootstrap modal — the API-survival test PASSED, and even the header divergence is a pure token swap. radius/shadow are RENDERED values, not theme-file tokens.

alert.note: acuity-only in the tool TODAY, but legacy ships a real alert too (.one45-alert + 154 Error/* Twig uses) — a both-native rework is recommended; see reconciliation §4d.

badge.note: the tool's Badge predates sourcing; the real Badge is acuity-DS only (legacy has no status badge) — correct to acuity-only next slice.

progressBar.note: not enshrined this slice — acuity-real, legacy near-absent (deferred to a bridge-interim slice).

spinner.note: not enshrined this slice — acuity-real, legacy uses a webeval `busy` cog GIF with no CSS (deferred).

feedback.gaps: Toast/snackbar, tooltip (react-bootstrap, not DS), popover (react-bootstrap), tag/chip, empty-state — NOT in the acuity DS package (zero usages). Tag/chip + empty-state + toast are gaps in BOTH systems -> not enshrined (the Pagination rule).
